rules.hierarchy_gap: The jump between a heading and its subheading must not exceed 2 Tailwind steps.

rules.contrast: Text must meet APCA standards. Normal text min 4.5:1, large text 3:1.
rules.hover: Always explicitly set text color on hover (e.g., hover:bg-slate-900 hover:text-white).
rules.tinting: Never use pure #000000 or #808080 without a tint, except for Obsidian (#0A0A0A) which acts as our high-contrast base.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing with Strict Hierarchy. Use Grid Borders for data sections to expose the skeleton.

alignment.headings: Left-align dense content, center only if it improves visual hierarchy in heroes.
alignment.data: Left-align for readability, right-align numeric values in tables.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: p-4, p-6, p-8 for containers. Internal padding must be p-6 or p-8 to prevent text collision.

cards.style: Flat solid surfaces, subtle roundness (max 8px border-radius), 1px border (border-border), no shadows.
cards.hover: Slight lift (-translate-y-1), subtle shadow (shadow-md), border color darkens.

headers.style: Crystal Glass for sticky elements (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70, border-b border-slate-200/50) or solid background with hard bottom border.

buttons.primary: bg-[#002FA7] text-white hover:bg-[#00227A] rounded-md px-6 py-2 transition-all duration-200
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#0A0A0A] border border-[#0A0A0A]/10 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-md px-6 py-2 transition-all duration-200

inputs.style: Shadcn components heavily customized. Flat, crisp borders (border-slate-300), focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#002FA7]/20 focus:border-[#002FA7].

tables.style: Shadcn table. Clean row separators, hover:bg-slate-50, distinct header styling with overline text.

maps.style: React-Leaflet or similar. Use a monochrome/grayscale tile layer (like CartoDB Positron) to blend with the UI, highlight markers and routes using brand and status colors.

motion_and_interactions.hover: All interactive elements must have clear hover and click/press states.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Use specific properties (transition-transform duration-200 ease-out, transition-colors).
motion_and_interactions.accessibility: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Use aria-hidden on purely decorative elements.

icons_and_assets.style: Use regular or duotone weights for dashboard density.

testing.requirement: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.

delivery_van.description: Modern black delivery van, ideal for fleet placeholder or landing page sections.

warehouse_logistics.description: Warehouse and cardboard boxes, useful for organization or settings pages.

driver_smiling.description: Smiling delivery driver in uniform, perfect for driver portal login or profile section.

instructions_to_main_agent.file_extensions: Use .js and .jsx files for React components. Do not use .tsx or TypeScript since the project is JS-based.
instructions_to_main_agent.shadcn_customization: Heavily customize Shadcn components to follow the 'Swiss & High-Contrast' archetype. Strip out generic styles, apply the defined fonts (Chivo for headings, IBM Plex Sans for body), and use the high-contrast color palette.
instructions_to_main_agent.dashboard_layout: Implement the 'Control Room' grid for dashboards. Avoid putting everything in identical cards; use grid borders and flat design to increase data density.
instructions_to_main_agent.map_integration: For the live tracking map, ensure the map tiles are styled neutrally (monochrome) so that route lines and driver pins (using brand/status colors) stand out clearly.
instructions_to_main_agent.accessibility: Follow APCA contrast rules. Ensure all interactive components have proper focus states and hover transitions.
instructions_to_main_agent.testing_attributes: Add data-testid attributes to all buttons, links, inputs, and major layout sections.
